feed.title: U.S. Courts — Pending Rules and Forms Amendments
feed.subtitle: Judiciary-wide status page for pending amendments to the Federal Rules of Civil, Criminal, Appellate, Bankruptcy, and Evidence procedure — the rules that govern every federal case in the District of Maine and the First Circuit. Prose/link page with no repeating dated list, monitored by full-page fingerprint so amendment postings surface as change items.

entry.title: Page updated: U.S. Courts — Pending Rules and Forms Amendments
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + Bankruptcy Rule 2002, Official Forms 101 and 106C + 1 + ; + 1 + Official Forms 101 and 106C will become effective December 1, 2026. Removed: - Bankruptcy Rule 2002, Official Forms 101 and 106C;
